post.content:
Afternoon,

I have an upcoming interview with Uber for a SEII, and I was wondering, based on y'alls experience, what would be the best strategy to prepare for it? 
I was thinking of doing the top 50 most frequent Uber questions here on LC, plus some Neetcode, but I am open to suggestions and recommendations.
Does Uber focus more on graph (given the nature of the business), or something else?
Any input would be welcome. 

Thanks!
Where you able to give this interview ? If yes, do you mind sharing your experience?
